label: 黏菌算法
description: 模拟黏菌（Physarum polycephalum）的觅食行为，在网格掩码内生成有机的网状通道结构
description-en: Simulates Physarum polycephalum slime mold foraging behavior to generate organic web-like network patterns within a grid mask.
icon: 俯视网格内蜿蜒交织的有机脉络网络，多条细线从中心向四周延伸分叉，形如菌丝或血管，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入掩码网格，非零区域为仿真域，智能体仅在此区域内活动
inputs.description-en: Input mask grid; non-zero cells define the simulation domain where agents move.

inputs.name: agentCount
inputs.label: 智能体数量
inputs.description: 智能体（黏菌颗粒）的数量，越多则网络越密集
inputs.description-en: Number of slime mold agents; more agents produce denser networks.

inputs.name: steps
inputs.label: 仿真步数
inputs.description: 仿真迭代总步数，步数越多网络越成熟、收敛
inputs.description-en: Total simulation steps; more steps produce more mature and converged networks.

inputs.name: sensorAngle
inputs.label: 感知角度
inputs.description: 智能体三个传感器相对前进方向的张角（度），控制转向灵敏度
inputs.description-en: Angle (degrees) between the forward direction and side sensors, controlling turning sensitivity.

inputs.name: sensorDistance
inputs.label: 感知距离
inputs.description: 智能体传感器的前瞻距离（格），越大则路径越平滑
inputs.description-en: Look-ahead distance in cells for agent sensors; larger values produce smoother paths.

inputs.name: turnSpeed
inputs.label: 转向速度
inputs.description: 每步最大转向角度（度），越大则路径越曲折
inputs.description-en: Maximum turn angle per step in degrees; larger values produce more winding paths.

inputs.name: stepSize
inputs.label: 步长
inputs.description: 智能体每步的移动距离（格），越大则轨迹越稀疏
inputs.description-en: Distance each agent moves per step in grid units; larger values produce sparser trails.

inputs.name: decayRate
inputs.label: 轨迹衰减率
inputs.description: 每步后轨迹浓度的保留比例（0~1），越小则轨迹消散越快，网络越稀疏
inputs.description-en: Fraction of trail concentration retained each step (0~1); smaller values cause faster decay and sparser networks.

inputs.name: depositAmount
inputs.label: 轨迹沉积量
inputs.description: 智能体每步累加沉积的轨迹浓度，越大则路径越粗
inputs.description-en: Amount of trail deposited (additive) per step; larger values produce thicker paths.

inputs.name: depositRadius
inputs.label: 沉积半径
inputs.description: 智能体沉积轨迹的圆盘半径（格），越大则路径越宽
inputs.description-en: Radius of the disk footprint for trail deposition in grid units; larger values produce wider paths.

inputs.name: trailThreshold
inputs.label: 路径阈值
inputs.description: 轨迹浓度超过最大值的此比例时标记为路径（0~1），越大则输出路径越细
inputs.description-en: Cells with trail >= maxTrail * this value are marked as path (0~1); larger values produce thinner output paths.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳自动生成
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses the current timestamp for automatic randomization.

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: 黏菌网格
outputs.description: 输出网格：路径（高轨迹浓度）区域值为 1，其余为 0
outputs.description-en: Output grid: cells with high trail concentration = 1 (path), all others = 0.
